channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Police officer recounts hearing gunshot and seeing Charlie Kirk fall at hearing
item.description: A former Utah Valley University police officer testified Monday that he heard a gunshot and saw Charlie Kirk collapse.

item.title: Florida Shows How States Can Restrain Rogue Judges Who Let Violent Criminals Go Free
item.description: So much anxiety could be relieved if the actual perpetrators of injustice, both the criminals and the judges that enable them, were removed once and for all.

item.title: Trillionaires Like Elon Musk Aren’t A Problem For America, Envious Leftists Are
item.description: Multimillionaire politicians denounce billionaires as the source of all evil, to the applause of college graduates pretending to be working class. It's a distraction from real issues.

item.title: John Roberts Again Undermines SCOTUS Legitimacy With Irreconcilable Slaughter And Cook Opinions
item.description: In one ruling, SCOTUS affirmed the president's power to fire independent agency officials. On the same day, it invented a fourth branch of government, raising questions about consistency.
